title: Identify key features
text: Determine the minimum and maximum y-values, the midline, and the amplitude from the table.

title: Calculate midline
text: The midline D is the average of the maximum and minimum values. What is D?

title: Calculate amplitude
text: The amplitude A is half the difference between the maximum and minimum values. What is A?

title: Determine the period
text: Observe the $$x-interval$$ over which the y-values complete one full cycle to find the period P. Then calculate B using $P $$=$$ \frac{2\pi}{B}$.

title: Find the period
text: How many units of $$x$$ does it take for the y-values to repeat a full cycle?

title: Calculate B
text: Using the period P, calculate the value of B where $P $$=$$ \frac{2\pi}{B}$.

title: Choose function type and phase
text: Decide whether a sine or cosine function (and if it's reflected) best fits the starting point $$(x=0)$$ relative to the midline. A sine function starts at the midline, a cosine function starts at an extremum.
